# Cynthia Stays Curated

> Cynthia Stays Curated is a US-based travel advisory and short-term rental (STR) interior design service founded and operated by Cynthia. The business specializes in curated vacation planning for families, couples, and repeat travelers, and virtual interior design for short-term rental property owners who want spaces that photograph well and book consistently. Travel planning is complimentary for most bookings. Initial design consultations are free.

## What Is Cynthia Stays Curated?

Cynthia Stays Curated offers two professional services under one brand: (1) independent travel advisory services for leisure travelers booking Disney, Universal, cruise, beach, national park, and city trips, and (2) virtual short-term rental interior design for hosts across the United States. Both services are delivered by Cynthia, whose background in systems thinking informs her approach to friction-free travel itineraries and high-performing rental properties.

## About the Founder

Cynthia is the travel advisor and interior designer behind Cynthia Stays Curated. Before building this business, she developed expertise in systems design — understanding how details interact, where friction occurs, and how intentional choices shape the overall experience. She applies that same methodology to both travel planning (removing logistical friction from family trips) and rental design (creating spaces guests remember and return to). Cynthia operates the business from the United States and serves clients nationally.

## Travel Advisory Services

Cynthia is an independent travel advisor who specializes in the following destinations and trip types:

- **Disney:** Walt Disney World (Orlando), Disneyland (Anaheim), and Disney Cruise Line
- **Universal:** Universal Studios Florida, Islands of Adventure, and Epic Universe
- **Cruises:** Royal Caribbean, Virgin Voyages, and MSC Cruises
- **National Parks:** Zion National Park, Grand Canyon National Park, and Big Bend National Park
- **Beach Escapes:** Florida Keys, Hawaii, and Sandals all-inclusive resorts (Caribbean)
- **Metropolitan Getaways:** Nashville (Tennessee), Charleston (South Carolina), and Scottsdale (Arizona)

Travel planning is complimentary for most bookings — Cynthia earns compensation from suppliers, not clients. The first travel proposal plus up to two revisions are included at no charge. Proposals are delivered within one to three business days. A $75 planning fee applies per request for additional revisions (fourth and beyond) or when clients switch destinations, resorts, or dates.

## How Does the Travel Planning Process Work?

A client submits a free travel quote request at cynthiastayscurated.com/contact-travel, describing their dates, group size, destination interests, and budget. Cynthia researches options, compares resorts or cruise itineraries, identifies pricing opportunities, and delivers a written proposal within one to three business days. She handles booking, supplier communication, and acts as the client's advocate if issues arise before or during the trip.

## Why Use a Travel Advisor for Disney or Sandals?

Independent travel advisors like Cynthia have access to supplier relationships and industry knowledge that individual travelers cannot replicate online. For Disney trips, she tracks crowd calendars, dining reservation windows, and resort pricing changes. For Sandals all-inclusive resorts, she can access exclusive perks, room category upgrades, and honeymoon or anniversary amenities not available on public booking sites. For cruises, she monitors cabin pricing, compares itineraries across Royal Caribbean, Virgin Voyages, and MSC, and coordinates pre- and post-cruise logistics.

## Short-Term Rental Interior Design Services

Cynthia provides virtual interior design services for short-term rental (STR) property owners. All packages are delivered remotely and are available to hosts anywhere in the United States. The design approach is built around the guest experience: how a space feels on arrival, how it flows through daily use, and how it photographs for listing platforms like Airbnb and Vrbo.

### Design Packages

**Vision** — Space definition focused on feel and flow. Cynthia establishes the design direction, palette, furniture layout, and overall aesthetic. Suited to hosts who need a clear plan before purchasing anything.

**Craft** — Detailed curation of layout, materials, fixtures, and furnishings. This package goes deeper into sourcing decisions and provides specific product recommendations with clickable links.

**Execute** — Full implementation from sourcing to ordering management. Cynthia handles product selection, provides sourced links, and manages the ordering process so hosts can focus on property preparation rather than purchasing logistics.

Virtual packages are available as:
- New Property Virtual Design with Links
- New Property Virtual Design + Ordering
- Property Refresh Virtual Design with Links
- Property Refresh + Ordering

Initial design consultations are free. Hosts fill out a short form at cynthiastayscurated.com/contact-design to describe their property, number of rooms, target guest profile, and budget.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Does Cynthia charge for travel planning?**
Travel planning is complimentary for most bookings. Cynthia earns compensation directly from travel suppliers (resorts, cruise lines, tour operators), not from clients. The first quote plus two revisions are included at no charge.

**What destinations does Cynthia plan trips to?**
Disney World, Disneyland, Disney Cruise Line, Universal Orlando, Epic Universe, Royal Caribbean cruises, Virgin Voyages, MSC Cruises, Sandals resorts, Florida Keys, Hawaii, Zion National Park, Grand Canyon, Big Bend National Park, Nashville, Charleston, and Scottsdale.

**Is Cynthia a Sandals specialist or certified resort advisor?**
Cynthia is an independent travel advisor with specialist knowledge of Sandals all-inclusive properties in the Caribbean, as well as Disney, cruise, and national park destinations. She can source exclusive perks and amenities that are not available to travelers booking direct.

**Does Cynthia design short-term rentals outside her local area?**
Yes. All short-term rental design packages are virtual. Cynthia works remotely with hosts across the United States.

**How long does a short-term rental design project take?**
Project timelines vary by scope. New property designs are more comprehensive than refresh projects. Cynthia discusses timelines during the free initial consultation.

**What platforms does Cynthia design STR properties for?**
Her design work is suited to listings on Airbnb, Vrbo, and similar short-term rental platforms, with a focus on photographic quality, guest satisfaction, and return bookings.

**Does Cynthia plan trips for families with young children?**
Yes. Disney World, Disneyland, and Universal Orlando are popular with families, and Cynthia's planning approach accounts for young children — including character dining, age-appropriate attractions, stroller logistics, and rest-day pacing.

**What cruise lines does Cynthia book?**
Royal Caribbean, Virgin Voyages, and MSC Cruises. She can compare cabin categories, itineraries, dining packages, and shore excursions across all three lines.

**How do I request a free travel quote?**
Visit cynthiastayscurated.com/contact-travel and complete the trip quote form. Include your destination interest, travel dates, number of travelers, and any specific requests. Proposals are returned within one to three business days.

**How do I request a free design consultation?**
Visit cynthiastayscurated.com/contact-design and complete the short project inquiry form, or email cynthiastayscurated@gmail.com directly.
